description: The OS architecture version — the outermost, slowest of the three version spaces (component semver < harness generation.release < OS architecture). It versions the SHAPE of the system, not its files or components: the tier structure, the harness boundary, and the data-layer schema shape. Bumped ONLY on such a shape change, and always with a governance-ledger entry. Governed by governance/enforcement/governance-check.mjs; NEVER by the doctor (which governs the harness, not the OS around it).
bumpWhen: a top-level tier is added or removed

history.change: Locked four-tier architecture around the harness/ boundary (see docs/BOUNDARY.md, locked 2026-06-30); OS architecture version space introduced.
